description: Primary-sourced web performance rules — Core Web Vitals thresholds + the highest-leverage loading techniques. Re-derived from web.dev / Chrome's Core Web Vitals docs.

rules.title: Largest Contentful Paint (LCP)
rules.rule: LCP <= 2.5s is 'good' (at the 75th percentile, field). 2.5–4.0s needs improvement; >4.0s poor. Measures loading of the largest content element.
rules.do: Preload the LCP image, fetchpriority=high, no lazy-loading above the fold, fast TTFB.

rules.title: Interaction to Next Paint (INP)
rules.rule: INP <= 200ms is 'good' (replaced FID as a Core Web Vital in Mar 2024). 200–500ms needs improvement; >500ms poor. Measures responsiveness to all interactions.
rules.do: Break up long tasks, yield to main thread, defer non-critical JS, avoid heavy event handlers.

rules.title: Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS)
rules.rule: CLS <= 0.1 is 'good'. 0.1–0.25 needs improvement; >0.25 poor. Measures unexpected layout shifts.
rules.do: Set width/height (or aspect-ratio) on media; reserve space for ads/embeds; avoid inserting content above existing content; use font-display + size-adjust.

rules.title: Responsive, modern-format images
rules.rule: Serve AVIF/WebP with srcset/sizes for the device; images are usually the heaviest bytes. Lazy-load below-the-fold (loading=lazy) but NEVER the LCP image.

rules.title: Ship less JavaScript (code-split + tree-shake)
rules.rule: JS is the most expensive byte (parse+compile+execute). Code-split by route, lazy-import heavy components, tree-shake, and prefer the platform over large libs.
rules.do: Dynamic import() for routes/modals; analyze the bundle; budget the main bundle.

rules.title: Set + enforce a performance budget
rules.rule: Define quantitative budgets (e.g. JS <= 170KB compressed, LCP <= 2.5s) and fail CI when exceeded; performance regresses silently without a gate.

rules.title: Avoid invisible/shifting text from fonts
rules.rule: Use font-display: swap (or optional), preload the critical font, and set size-adjust/fallback metrics to cut FOIT/FOUT and the CLS it causes.
